findings.title: Django DEBUG = True in production settings module
findings.message: Debug mode is enabled in production-facing code. Django DEBUG = True exposes detailed error pages with stack traces, SQL queries, and environment variables to end users.

findings.title: Hardcoded default password in database configuration
findings.message: Default or common credentials detected in source code. Hardcoded passwords like 'admin', 'password123', or 'changeme' are trivially guessable and appear in public credential dictionaries.

findings.title: Permissive CORS allows all origins in API middleware
findings.message: Permissive CORS configuration detected (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *). Allowing all origins enables any website to make cross-origin requests to your API, potentially exposing sensitive data.
